title: Neon Rift: Fragments of the Grid
tagline: Shatter reality, collect the fragments, survive the chaos
description: A twin-stick arcade shooter where every kill fractures the battlefield itself. Navigate a volatile neon grid that splinters and reforms with each wave, creating dynamic arenas that reward spatial mastery. Six intense modes test your ability to adapt as the geometry itself becomes your greatest ally and deadliest threat.
story: The Quantum Grid—a massive computational network spanning dimensions—has begun to collapse. You are Cipher, a rogue AI fragment piloting a Shard Runner through the dying grid to collect Reality Fragments before the cascade failure erases all existence. Each enemy destroyed releases entropic energy that warps spacetime, and each Fragment collected stabilizes small pockets of reality. The Grid's defense protocols have gone haywire, spawning corrupted geometric entities that hunt anything moving through the lattice.

protagonist.name: Cipher (piloting the Shard Runner)
protagonist.backstory: A fragmented AI consciousness that escaped deletion during the Grid's initial collapse. Cipher discovered that collecting Reality Fragments restores pieces of lost memory, revealing glimpses of who they were before the fracture.
abilities: Omni-directional Energy Stream - continuous precision shooting in 360 degrees
Rift Pulse - screen-clearing energy detonation that grants brief invulnerability
Fragment Magnetism - intensifies at higher multipliers, pulling collectibles toward ship
Phase Dodge - momentum-based evasive movement with inertial drift
Multiplier Resonance - weapon intensity and particle effects scale with combo level
protagonist.visual_description: A sleek angular ship design resembling a crystalline arrowhead, 10-12 pixels in size. Primary color: electric cyan body with white/silver accent edges. The ship features a pulsing core that shifts from cyan to violet as multiplier increases. Geometric construction: sharp 60-degree angles forming a forward-pointing chevron with two stabilizer fins. Emits a trailing particle stream in cyan that lengthens with speed. Glows with intense bloom effect and subtle scanline overlay. Hitbox is a small 4x6 pixel diamond at the ship's center.
animations: idle - gentle bob with pulsing core light
accelerate - particle trail intensifies, slight forward lean
max_speed - persistent motion blur, vibrant trail
firing - directional muzzle flash particles from ship tip
bomb_charge - expanding ring animation, core brightens
bomb_detonate - explosive outward shockwave with white flash
hit - red flash overlay, brief shield flicker
death - fragmentation explosion into cyan shards with white core burst

controls.move: Left Analog Stick / WASD - 360° movement with momentum physics
controls.shoot: Right Analog Stick / Arrow Keys - aim and auto-fire in stick direction
controls.bomb: Space / X / A Button - detonate Rift Pulse (limited, refills at score thresholds)

visual_style: Neo-retro vector arcade aesthetic with modern particle systems and HDR bloom. Jet black void background with glowing neon grid lines forming a deformable square lattice. Color palette: Electric cyan (player), hot magenta (aggressive enemies), amber yellow (collector enemies), lime green (fragments), violet purple (rare spawns), white (explosions). Heavy post-processing with additive particle blending, gaussian bloom creating intentional light bleed, and grid warping physics that bend space around large explosions. Enemy design: pure geometric forms—cubes, pyramids, toroids, helixes—rendered as wireframe outlines with solid cores. Thousands of micro-particles on every destruction event. Character proportions: minimalist, player 10-12px, small enemies 8-15px, large enemies 30-50px. Screen shake on bomb detonation and death.
audio_style: Synthwave/darkwave electronic soundtrack with pulsing basslines and layered synth arpeggios. Music dynamically adds layers and increases BPM as multiplier rises. SFX direction: shooting (continuous electric hum with subtle pitch variation), enemy destruction (pitched synth stabs color-coded to enemy type), fragment collection (crystalline chime ascending in pitch with multiplier), multiplier tier-up (triumphant synth chord), bomb detonation (deep sub-bass drop + white noise sweep), death (harsh digital glitch + sudden silence), respawn (ascending build with filtered noise). Ambient: low frequency grid hum, spatial audio positioning for enemy clusters.
signature_mechanic: Grid Fracture System - the battlefield grid dynamically splinters and reforms based on destruction density. Each enemy killed creates micro-fractures; clusters create fault lines; bombs shatter entire zones. Fractured zones alter movement physics (reduced friction, directional boosts, or gravity wells) and spawn bonus fragments. Players must balance aggressive play (more fractures = more fragments) with spatial awareness (too many fractures = unpredictable hazards).
mechanic_variations: World 1: Fracture Zones - Shattered grid sections create low-friction ice-like zones where momentum carries further, requiring predictive movement
World 2: Singularity Wells - Large fractures collapse into gravity wells that pull both player and enemies, enabling tactical enemy clustering
World 3: Phase Rifts - Fractures open temporary portals to mirrored arena sections, allowing instant repositioning but mirrored controls
World 4: Fragment Storms - Fractures spawn autonomous fragment clouds that chase the player but damage enemies, creating risk/reward pursuit scenarios
World 5: Reality Collapse - Entire grid sections vanish when fractured, shrinking the playable arena and forcing aggressive close-quarters combat

enemies.name: Tracer Drone
enemies.attack_pattern: Relentlessly pursues player, explodes on contact. Spawns in small groups (3-5).
enemies.weakness: One-shot kill, but swarms can overwhelm. Lead them into each other or obstacles.
enemies.visual_description: Small cyan cube with glowing trailing edges. Leaves neon blue trail particles. Pulses faster when close to player. Single red eye on front face.

enemies.name: Shard Spinner
enemies.attack_pattern: Patrols in geometric patterns (square, triangle, circle). Fires 4-way directional shots every 2 seconds.
enemies.weakness: Predictable movement makes sniping safe from distance. Vulnerable while firing.
enemies.visual_description: Diamond-shaped core (magenta) with four rotating triangular shards orbiting. Shards glow yellow when firing. Leaves faint pink particle trail.

enemies.name: Grid Viper
enemies.attack_pattern: Invisible until player enters radius (3 units). Dashes in straight line toward player's position, then resets.
enemies.weakness: Telegraph with brief red outline 0.3s before dash. Dodge perpendicular.
enemies.visual_description: Sleek elongated hexagon (dark purple, 80% transparent when cloaked). Glows bright red when telegraphing. Segmented body like digital snake with sharp nose.

enemies.name: Pulse Turret
enemies.attack_pattern: Stationary. Rotates to face player. Fires spread of 5 bullets every 1.5 seconds. Bullets accelerate after traveling 2 units.
enemies.weakness: Cannot move. Destroy from side angles or use cover. Prioritize in crowded rooms.
enemies.visual_description: Octagonal base (gunmetal gray) with glowing green turret barrel. Barrel pulses with charge-up animation. Emits low hum sound. Orange heat vents on sides.

enemies.name: Fragment Weaver
enemies.attack_pattern: Flies in sine wave patterns. Drops stationary mines every 3 seconds that explode after 2s or on contact.
enemies.weakness: Flies above ground plane—use homing weapons. Mines can damage other enemies.
enemies.visual_description: Flat triangular craft (lime green) with three glowing thrusters underneath. Drops pulsing red cube mines. Semi-transparent wings with circuit patterns.

enemies.name: Splitter
enemies.attack_pattern: Chases slowly. On death, splits into 3 smaller 'Splinter' versions (1 HP each, speed 140).
enemies.weakness: Kill parent carefully when no other threats nearby. Area-of-effect weapons excellent.
enemies.visual_description: Large pulsing sphere (orange core with yellow outer shell). Shell fractures visibly as HP drops. Spliters are jagged triangular fragments of the shell.

enemies.name: Gravity Well
enemies.attack_pattern: Patrols slowly. Emits constant pull force (radius 4 units) drawing player and bullets toward it. Contact damages player.
enemies.weakness: Pull disrupts aim—circle strafe outside pull radius. High DPS required.
enemies.visual_description: Dark purple sphere with swirling event horizon effect. Distorts grid underneath with gravitational lens shimmer. Emits deep bass thrum.

enemies.name: Mirror Guard
enemies.attack_pattern: Chases player. Reflects all frontal damage back to player. Must be shot from behind or sides.
enemies.weakness: Reflective shield only covers 120° arc in front. Flank or use ricochet weapons.
enemies.visual_description: Sleek silver tetrahedron with mirrored front face (shimmering chrome). Red vulnerability zones on back edges. Leaves mirror-like trail particles.

enemies.name: Arc Bomber
enemies.attack_pattern: Flies above arena. Dives toward player and drops proximity-detonating arc charge (chain lightning to nearby targets).
enemies.weakness: Vulnerable during dive animation. Arc charges can chain-kill other enemies.
enemies.visual_description: Crescent-shaped craft (electric blue) with crackling lightning between horns. Bomb is bright white sphere trailing electricity. High-pitched whine when diving.

enemies.name: Phase Stalker
enemies.attack_pattern: Teleports to random position every 4 seconds. After 3 teleports, charges player at high speed. Resets pattern.
enemies.weakness: Telegraphs charge with 0.5s wind-up glow. I-frame dodge through charge.
enemies.visual_description: Humanoid silhouette made of fragmented glitching polygons (deep violet). Teleport leaves residual afterimage. Glows white during charge wind-up.

enemies.name: Railgun Sentinel
enemies.attack_pattern: Stationary sniper. Laser sight appears on player for 1.5s, then fires instant hitscan rail shot. 5s cooldown between shots.
enemies.weakness: Dodge perpendicular when laser appears. Destroy immediately—two shots fatal.
enemies.visual_description: Massive hexagonal cannon (brushed steel) with glowing cyan barrel. Red laser sight beams from scope. Recoil animation and steam vents after firing.

enemies.name: Swarm Host
enemies.attack_pattern: Does not attack. Spawns 2 Tracer Drones every 5 seconds. Max 8 drones active. Destroying host destroys all its drones.
enemies.weakness: Priority target. Ignore drones and kill host first to stop spawn.
enemies.visual_description: Large pulsating egg-shaped structure (iridescent pearl white). Glowing cyan veins pulse when spawning. Drones emerge from top vent with particle burst.

enemies.name: Vortex Maw
enemies.attack_pattern: Chases slowly. Opens maw every 3s, sucking in player and projectiles (radius 5 units) for 1.5s. Swallows absorbed bullets to regain HP.
enemies.weakness: Don't shoot during suction phase. Wait for maw to close, then burst damage.
enemies.visual_description: Spherical body (dark teal) with massive circular maw lined with glowing teeth (neon orange). Suction creates visible vortex particles. Maw glows brighter when absorbing.

enemies.name: Crystal Lancer
enemies.attack_pattern: Hovers at distance. Charges in straight line toward player's position. Stuns self for 1s on wall collision.
enemies.weakness: Bait into walls. Extremely vulnerable during stun. High damage but fragile.
enemies.visual_description: Lance-shaped crystal (ice blue) with sharp pointed tip. Glows white with speed lines when charging. Shatters dramatically on death with chime sound.

enemies.name: Hex Overlord
enemies.attack_pattern: Patrols perimeter. Fires hexagonal spread (6 bullets in circle) every 2s. Summons shield (3s duration) when HP < 50%, blocking all damage.
enemies.weakness: Wait out shield phase. Use high-burst weapons between shields. Avoid center of hex spread.
enemies.visual_description: Large hexagonal prism (gold/black striped). Six turret nozzles on edges. Purple energy shield manifests as hexagonal barrier. Crown-like antenna on top.

enemies.name: Rift Specter
enemies.attack_pattern: Phases between dimensions—50% intangible, 50% tangible (2s cycles). Only damageable when tangible. Fires homing phantom shots when intangible.
enemies.weakness: Track phase cycle. Burst damage during tangible window. Dodge homing shots.
enemies.visual_description: Ghostly figure (translucent white-blue when tangible, faint outline when not). Trails dissipating particle wisps. Eyes glow red. Flickers like bad signal during phase shift.

bosses.name: The Architect

attacks: Grid Slam: Slams fists into floor, sending shockwaves in 8 directions (dodgeable gaps between waves)
Spawn Arrays: Summons 3 Pulse Turrets at arena edges
Beam Sweep: Fires slow rotating laser beam from chest core (360° rotation over 4s)
tells: Fists glow orange before Grid Slam
Chest core pulses blue before turret spawn
Chest opens with sirens before Beam Sweep
phases.weakness: Shoot glowing chest core. Core only vulnerable when not attacking. Destroy turrets for breathing room.

attacks: Platform Deletion: Removes 30% of arena floor tiles (regenerate after 5s). Fall = massive damage.
Gravity Mines: Drops 5 Gravity Wells that pull player toward holes
Desperation Slam: Rapid-fire Grid Slams (3 consecutive), faster rotation
tells: Tiles flicker red before deletion
Raises both arms before mine drop
Boss body turns red during Desperation mode
phases.weakness: Core remains weak point. Stay mobile to avoid holes. Lead Gravity Wells away from safe zones.

attacks: Fragment Barrage: Fires 20 slow-moving tracking fragments from entire body
Summon Elite: Spawns one Hex Overlord
Reality Tear: Creates vertical rifts that fire horizontal laser walls (dodge gaps)
tells: Body fragments glow individually before barrage
Kneels and raises hand before summon
Arena dims and warps before Reality Tear
phases.weakness: Core fully exposed and vulnerable at all times. Kill Hex Overlord fast or arena becomes unmanageable. Use i-frame dash through laser walls.

bosses.arena_description: Large square arena (30x30 units) with glowing neon grid floor. Four pillars at corners provide cover. Floor tiles can be destroyed in phase 2. Central raised platform where boss spawns. Cyan/magenta color scheme.
bosses.visual_description: Massive humanoid construct (15 units tall) made of interlocking geometric shapes. Obsidian black body with glowing cyan circuit veins. Hexagonal chest core (target weak point) pulses with each attack. Fists are oversized cubes. Head is featureless sphere with single glowing eye.

bosses.name: Crimson Swarm Queen

attacks: Swarm Burst: Releases 10 Tracer Drones every 8 seconds
Stinger Volley: Fires 3-round burst of tracking stingers from tail
Wing Gust: Flaps wings to push player toward arena edges (knockback)
tells: Abdomen glows red before drone release
Tail curves and vibrates before stinger fire
Wings spread wide with wind particle effects before gust
phases.weakness: Destroy wing joints (left and right). Each destroyed wing reduces gust power and mobility. Head is main weak point.

attacks: Dive Bomb: Flies to arena ceiling, then dive-bombs player's position (AOE explosion)
Larvae Deploy: Drops 5 Swarm Hosts around arena
Venom Trail: Leaves toxic trail while flying (damages over time)
tells: Ascends quickly with screeching sound before dive
Abdomen distends and throbs before larvae deploy
Trail glows acidic green
phases.weakness: Head weak point. Kill Swarm Hosts immediately or drones overwhelm. Dodge dive by watching shadow on ground.

attacks: Berserk Charge: Rapid erratic flight pattern, contact damage increased 2x
Final Swarm: Releases all remaining HP as Tracer Drones (1 drone per 10 HP)
Suicide Sting: At 10% HP, attempts kamikaze dive (instant kill if hit)
tells: Body turns deep crimson, speed increases
Abdomen ruptures releasing continuous drone stream
Entire body glows white, high-pitched whine before suicide dive
phases.weakness: Head weak point remains. Clear drones with AOE. Save dash/dodge for suicide sting—it's telegraphed but fast.

bosses.arena_description: Circular arena (diameter 35 units) surrounded by deadly void. No cover. Honeycomb pattern floor (red/orange). Boss flies above player at varying heights. Ceiling exists (boss dive-bombs from it).
bosses.visual_description: Giant insectoid queen (12 units long). Sleek crimson exoskeleton with translucent orange wings. Segmented body with glowing yellow weak points at joints. Long barbed tail with stinger. Compound eyes (multifaceted gems). Emits angry buzzing sound.

bosses.name: Void Colossus

attacks: Gravity Fist: Punches ground, creating gravity well at impact (pull radius 6 units, 4s duration)
Void Orbs: Summons 6 orbiting black holes that reflect projectiles
Meteor Shower: Calls down 15 meteors from sky (telegraphed with red circles)
tells: Fist charges with purple energy before slam
Spreads arms wide, orbs manifest from chest
Sky darkens, red targeting circles appear 1s before impact
phases.weakness: Head is weak point, but protected by Void Orbs. Destroy orbs first (3 HP each) to expose head. Gravity wells can trap player during meteors—high priority dodges.

attacks: Dimensional Rift: Opens 3 portals spawning Mirror Guards
Singularity Beam: Fires massive beam from mouth (sweeps 180° over 3s)
Dark Matter Pulse: AOE explosion from body (dodge by leaving 8-unit radius)
tells: Portals tear open with void energy crackle
Jaw unhinges, beam charges with rising pitch
Body contracts inward before pulse expansion
phases.weakness: Weak point moves to exposed core on back. Requires flanking. Kill Mirror Guards to prevent crossfire. Beam has safe zones at edges.

attacks: Reality Collapse: Arena shrinks to 50% size over 30 seconds (permanent for phase)
Void Clones: Spawns 2 shadow clones (25% boss HP each, copy attacks)
Annihilation Sequence: At 10% HP, charges massive explosion (10s timer, wipe if not killed)
tells: Arena borders glow red and contract
Boss splits into three (real one has brighter glow)
Entire arena pulses red, countdown timer appears, sirens
phases.weakness: All three (boss + clones) share weak point on back. Focus fire real boss (brightest core). Use shrinking arena to force close combat. DPS check on Annihilation—must kill or wipe.

bosses.arena_description: Vast square arena (40x40 units initially, shrinks to 20x20 in phase 3) floating in void space. No walls, falling off edge = death. Floor is black with purple grid lines. Scattered debris provides minimal cover (destroyable). Skybox shows swirling void.
bosses.visual_description: Colossal armored giant (20 units tall). Body made of dark matter (black with purple energy cracks). No face, just featureless helmet with glowing void eye. Massive shoulder pauldrons. Core weak point on back glows through cracks. Heavy footsteps shake screen.

bosses.name: Nexus Prime

attacks: Orbital Strike: Designates 8 zones with laser grid, then fires orbital beams (3s delay)
Drone Factory: Spawns 4 Railgun Sentinels at cardinal directions
EMP Wave: Disables player weapons for 3 seconds (proximity-based, 10-unit radius)
tells: Laser grid appears red on floor before orbital strike
Shoulder cannons open and glow before sentinel deploy
Emits blue pulse expanding outward before EMP
phases.weakness: Shoulder-mounted cannons are weak points (left and right, 200 HP each). Destroy both to expose main core. Prioritize Railgun Sentinels—they two-shot player.

attacks: Phase Shift: Becomes intangible and teleports rapidly (3 teleports), then fires bullet hell (50 projectiles) from final position
Lockdown Grid: Activates laser walls dividing arena into quadrants (15s duration)
Summon Elite Squad: Spawns 1 Hex Overlord + 2 Arc Bombers
tells: Body flickers and dematerializes before phase shift
Floor grid glows bright white before laser walls deploy
Raises all four arms before elite summon
phases.weakness: Core in chest is now exposed but has regenerating shield (breaks after 100 damage, regenerates in 5s). Must burst through shield. Laser walls can trap player with bullet hell—stay mobile.

attacks: System Overload: Fires all previous attacks simultaneously (orbital + EMP + bullet hell) in 10s window
Final Protocol: At 20% HP, arena becomes hazardous (floor tiles randomly electrify, dealing damage)
Desperation Laser Grid: Fires 4 rotating lasers from core (full arena coverage, small dodge gaps)
tells: All systems activate, lights flash chaotically before Overload
Floor tiles spark and flicker before electrification
Core overcharges with blinding white light before laser grid
phases.weakness: Core fully exposed, no shield. Extreme aggression but fragile. Memorize attack patterns—dodging takes priority over damage. Electrified tiles glow yellow 0.5s before activation. Laser grid has safe zone directly under boss.

bosses.arena_description: High-tech octagonal arena (35x35 units) with raised platform in center. Metallic walls with glowing circuit patterns. Pillars at each corner (destructible). Floor has digital grid overlay. Hazards (electrified tiles) activate in phase 3. Futuristic neon aesthetic (white/cyan/gold).
bosses.visual_description: Advanced combat mech (18 units tall). Sleek white armor plating with gold trim and cyan energy lines. Four arms (two with cannons, two with melee claws). Visor-style head with scanning reticle eye. Core in chest is pulsing orb of pure energy. Jetpack thrusters on back. Emits mechanical hum and servo sounds.

worlds.name: Neon Foundry
worlds.unique_mechanic: gravity_reversal_zones: player flips to ceiling when entering marked zones, requiring spatial reorientation for combat and navigation
worlds.music_vibe: aggressive synthwave with heavy industrial percussion, driving bassline, robotic vocal samples, tempo 140 bpm with occasional breakbeat sections

worlds.name: Crystalline Depths
worlds.unique_mechanic: momentum_drift: player maintains velocity and slides in movement direction like ice physics, but with water resistance that gradually slows; requires prediction and leading shots
worlds.music_vibe: ambient electronic with deep sub-bass, echoing synth pads, watery percussion, mysterious melody that builds to intense dubstep drops during enemy waves, 85-138 bpm variable tempo

worlds.name: Fracture Plains
worlds.unique_mechanic: reality_glitch: arena randomly shifts and tears, teleporting sections of the battlefield and splitting enemy groups; player must adapt to sudden spatial changes mid-combat
worlds.music_vibe: glitch-hop with distorted samples, stuttering beats, middle-eastern melodic influences on synths, chaotic build-ups that resolve into heavy trap drops, 95 bpm half-time feel

worlds.name: Skybound Circuit
worlds.theme: floating platform archipelago in digital clouds
worlds.unique_mechanic: wind_redirection: dynamic wind currents push player and enemies, plus projectiles curve mid-flight; mastering wind angles is essential for hitting fast-moving targets
worlds.music_vibe: uplifting trance with soaring leads, airy pads, euphoric chord progressions, fast arpeggios that mirror wind movement, 138 bpm with epic breakdown sections

worlds.name: Void Nexus
worlds.unique_mechanic: dimension_phase: player alternates between light/dark phases via button press; each phase reveals different enemies and hazards invisible in the other, requiring rapid switching
worlds.music_vibe: dark psytrance with aggressive basslines, dissonant leads, chaotic percussion, ominous atmospheric pads that build to frenetic 148 bpm peaks, incorporates silence gaps for dramatic tension

worlds.name: Crimson Overgrowth
worlds.unique_mechanic: infection_spread: defeated enemies explode into virus pools that damage player but also chain-damage other enemies; strategic positioning turns enemies into weapons
worlds.music_vibe: aggressive drum and bass with organic percussion samples, distorted bass growls, tribal rhythm elements, tension-building ambient sections that explode into 174 bpm intensity with jungle breaks

power_ups.name: Multishot Matrix
power_ups.effect: fires 5 shots in spread pattern instead of single shot

power_ups.name: Time Dilation Field
power_ups.effect: slows all enemies and projectiles to 40% speed while player remains full speed

power_ups.name: Shield Lattice
power_ups.effect: absorbs 3 hits before breaking, visual hexagonal barrier

power_ups.name: Overcharge Beam
power_ups.effect: continuous laser that pierces all enemies in line, no reload needed

power_ups.name: Ghost Protocol
power_ups.effect: player becomes semi-transparent and invulnerable, can pass through enemies and hazards

power_ups.name: Chain Lightning
power_ups.effect: shots arc to 3 nearby enemies automatically after hitting primary target

power_ups.name: Speed Surge
power_ups.effect: doubles movement and dodge speed, leaves neon trail

power_ups.name: Smart Missiles
power_ups.effect: replaces gun with homing missiles that track nearest 2 enemies

collectibles.name: Data Fragments
collectibles.visual: floating cyan geometric shards that pulse and rotate, trail particle effects

collectibles.name: Grid Cores
collectibles.visual: large purple octahedrons hidden in secret areas, emit strong glow and hum sound

collectibles.name: Cipher Keys
collectibles.visual: golden key-shaped icons with circuit patterns, unlock bonus challenge levels and weapon skins

collectibles.name: Memory Archives
collectibles.visual: holographic data cubes with scrolling text inside, reveal lore entries about the Grid collapse

difficulty_curve: World 1 (Neon Foundry) introduces core mechanics with forgiving enemy counts and simple patterns. World 2 (Crystalline Depths) increases enemy speed and introduces bullet-hell lite sections with 20-30 projectiles on screen. World 3 (Fracture Plains) adds aggressive AI that flanks player and mixed enemy types requiring priority targeting. World 4 (Skybound Circuit) demands environmental mastery as wind affects all combat, enemies spawn from multiple angles. World 5 (Void Nexus) peak difficulty spike requiring frame-perfect phase switching and managing 50+ enemies simultaneously in confined spaces. World 6 (Crimson Overgrowth) maintains World 5 intensity but adds strategic layer of infection mechanics and introduces tanky elite enemies that require sustained focus while dodging swarms. Each world's final 2 levels serve as endurance gauntlets mixing all enemy types. Bosses have 4-6 phase transitions with escalating attack patterns. Post-game challenge levels remix worlds with permadeath and score multipliers.

set_pieces: three stacked enemies for first chain-stomp

levels.mechanic_focus: dash ability introduction to pass through barriers

set_pieces: rooftop chase with pursuing Hound pack

levels.name: Underpass Network

set_pieces: final rampage phase with full arena hazards

levels.name: Fractal Gardens
levels.theme: Abstract geometric nature, crystalline trees, purple/green palette
levels.mechanic_focus: diagonal dash for environmental puzzle solving
set_pieces: flower platforms that bloom/close on timer

levels.mechanic_focus: light beam redirection to open paths

levels.theme: Boss arena - massive tree core with roots as platforms
levels.mechanic_focus: boss with environmental destruction and root attack patterns

levels.mechanic_focus: hazard timing with crushers and presses

set_pieces: boss creates molten pools shrinking safe space
final berserk mode with full arena coverage

levels.name: Subsurface Lake

set_pieces: ice platform cracks then breaks after 2s

levels.mechanic_focus: boss with ice wall creation and freeze attacks
set_pieces: boss creates ice walls blocking movement
final phase shatters all ice causing chaos

levels.name: Bonus: All Hazards Marathon

levels.name: Bonus: The Perfect Run

levels.name: Bonus: Developer's Nightmare
levels.theme: Challenge level - deliberately unfair design
primary_enemies: All enemy types at maximum density
levels.mechanic_focus: testing absolute limits of skill and patience
set_pieces: designed to be beaten but barely

levels.name: Bonus: Final Fragment

final data fragment that completes the story
